text:
First, note time zone offsets in 1995:  
- US/Eastern (EST) = UTC-5  
- Asia/Shanghai = UTC+8 (no DST in China in 1995)  

5 AM EST = 10:00 UTC (5 + 5 = 10).  
10:00 UTC + 8 hours = 18:00 in Shanghai.  
Date remains same day (Feb 15) because 18:00 is earlier than midnight UTC+8 relative to EST 5 AM.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1995-02-15 18:00
